_comment: Creator OS cost library: dated reference costs for the products, materials, and services the creator's projects commonly need. Every entry carries a source and an as_of date; entries with null prices are placeholders awaiting verification and are NEVER used as figures (protocols/no-fabrication.md). The cost-researcher agent proposes entries with citations; the human accepts them here. Sources for this library are registered in canonical-sources/source-registry.json via tools/source_currency.py (the only registry writer).

_schema.category: production_materials | equipment_capex | software_subscriptions | contractor_labor | travel | shipping_and_fees
_schema.price: number or null (null until verified; never estimated)
_schema.as_of: ISO date the price was observed, or null

entries.notes: placeholder awaiting a verified price; null is never used as a figure
